name: Google Cloud Storage
description: Stores and retrieves potentially large, immutable data objects. Provides APIs for bucket management, object operations, access control, notifications, and HMAC key management.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_insert
capabilities.description: Create an Anywhere Cache instance in a bucket.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_update
capabilities.description: Update configuration of an Anywhere Cache instance.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata of an Anywhere Cache instance.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_list
capabilities.description: List Anywhere Cache instances for a bucket.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_pause
capabilities.description: Pause an Anywhere Cache instance.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_resume
capabilities.description: Resume a paused or disabled Anywhere Cache instance.

capabilities.name: anywhere_caches_disable
capabilities.description: Disable an Anywhere Cache instance.

capabilities.name: bucket_access_controls_list
capabilities.description: List ACL entries on a bucket.

capabilities.name: bucket_access_controls_get
capabilities.description: Get an ACL entry for an entity on a bucket.

capabilities.name: bucket_access_controls_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new ACL entry on a bucket.

capabilities.name: bucket_access_controls_update
capabilities.description: Update an ACL entry on a bucket.

capabilities.name: bucket_access_controls_patch
capabilities.description: Patch an ACL entry on a bucket.

capabilities.name: bucket_access_controls_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an ACL entry from a bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_list
capabilities.description: List buckets in a project.

capabilities.name: buckets_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a specific bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_update
capabilities.description: Update a bucket (full replacement).

capabilities.name: buckets_patch
capabilities.description: Patch a bucket (partial update).

capabilities.name: buckets_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an empty bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_get_iam_policy
capabilities.description: Get the IAM policy for a bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_set_iam_policy
capabilities.description: Set the IAM policy for a bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_test_iam_permissions
capabilities.description: Test IAM permissions on a bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_lock_retention_policy
capabilities.description: Irreversibly lock the retention policy on a bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_relocate
capabilities.description: Initiate a bucket relocation operation.

capabilities.name: buckets_restore
capabilities.description: Restore a soft-deleted bucket.

capabilities.name: buckets_list_channels
capabilities.description: List notification channels for a bucket.

capabilities.name: channels_stop
capabilities.description: Stop receiving object change notifications through a channel.

capabilities.name: default_object_access_controls_list
capabilities.description: List default object ACL entries on a bucket.

capabilities.name: default_object_access_controls_get
capabilities.description: Get a default object ACL entry.

capabilities.name: default_object_access_controls_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new default object ACL entry.

capabilities.name: default_object_access_controls_update
capabilities.description: Update a default object ACL entry.

capabilities.name: default_object_access_controls_patch
capabilities.description: Patch a default object ACL entry.

capabilities.name: default_object_access_controls_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a default object ACL entry.

capabilities.name: folders_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new folder in a hierarchical namespace bucket.

capabilities.name: folders_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a folder.

capabilities.name: folders_list
capabilities.description: List folders in a bucket.

capabilities.name: folders_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an empty folder.

capabilities.name: folders_rename
capabilities.description: Rename a folder.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_list
capabilities.description: List managed folders in a bucket.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a managed folder.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_insert
capabilities.description: Create a managed folder.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a managed folder.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_get_iam_policy
capabilities.description: Get IAM policy for a managed folder.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_set_iam_policy
capabilities.description: Set IAM policy for a managed folder.

capabilities.name: managed_folders_test_iam_permissions
capabilities.description: Test IAM permissions on a managed folder.

capabilities.name: notifications_list
capabilities.description: List notification configurations for a bucket.

capabilities.name: notifications_get
capabilities.description: Get a notification configuration.

capabilities.name: notifications_insert
capabilities.description: Create a notification configuration for a bucket.

capabilities.name: notifications_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a notification configuration.

capabilities.name: object_access_controls_list
capabilities.description: List ACL entries for an object.

capabilities.name: object_access_controls_get
capabilities.description: Get an ACL entry for an object.

capabilities.name: object_access_controls_insert
capabilities.description: Create a new ACL entry for an object.

capabilities.name: object_access_controls_update
capabilities.description: Update an ACL entry for an object.

capabilities.name: object_access_controls_patch
capabilities.description: Patch an ACL entry for an object.

capabilities.name: object_access_controls_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an ACL entry for an object.

capabilities.name: objects_list
capabilities.description: List objects in a bucket.

capabilities.name: objects_get
capabilities.description: Get an object's metadata or download its content.

capabilities.name: objects_insert
capabilities.description: Upload a new object to a bucket.

capabilities.name: objects_update
capabilities.description: Update an object's metadata (full replacement).

capabilities.name: objects_patch
capabilities.description: Patch an object's metadata (partial update).

capabilities.name: objects_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an object.

capabilities.name: objects_compose
capabilities.description: Compose multiple objects into a single object.

capabilities.name: objects_copy
capabilities.description: Copy an object to a new location.

capabilities.name: objects_rewrite
capabilities.description: Rewrite an object to a new location with optional transformations.

capabilities.name: objects_move
capabilities.description: Move an object within the same bucket.

capabilities.name: objects_restore
capabilities.description: Restore a soft-deleted object.

capabilities.name: objects_bulk_restore
capabilities.description: Bulk restore soft-deleted objects in a bucket.

capabilities.name: objects_watch_all
capabilities.description: Watch for changes on all objects in a bucket.

capabilities.name: operations_list
capabilities.description: List long-running operations on a bucket.

capabilities.name: operations_get
capabilities.description: Get status of a long-running operation.

capabilities.name: operations_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a long-running operation.

capabilities.name: operations_advance_relocate_bucket
capabilities.description: Advance a bucket relocation operation.

capabilities.name: hmac_keys_list
capabilities.description: List HMAC keys for a project.

capabilities.name: hmac_keys_get
capabilities.description: Get metadata for an HMAC key.

capabilities.name: hmac_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a new HMAC key for a service account.

capabilities.name: hmac_keys_update
capabilities.description: Update the state of an HMAC key.

capabilities.name: hmac_keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an HMAC key.

capabilities.name: service_account_get
capabilities.description: Get the Cloud Storage service agent email for a project.
